patch.value: Reduce default verbosity of pm activity/history CLI output and add a compact mode to pm history

Dogfood (2026-05-20) found the human-facing CLI defaults for pm activity (~809 lines for 18 items) and pm history <id> (~241 lines for one item) dump full JSON Patch ops + before/after hashes per entry. pm activity --compact (4 lines/entry) exists but is opt-in, and pm history has no compact mode at all. The MCP/agent path now defaults to compact (pm-8jd3), but the CLI default and a history compact mode remain. Proposal: keep full patches behind --verbose/--patches and make a condensed view the default (or at least add `pm history <id> --compact`). Changing CLI defaults is a contract change touching several specs, so scope/test carefully.

pm history supports a compact projection; default verbosity of activity/history is reduced (or compact is the default) with full patches available behind an explicit flag; existing specs updated; build + 100% coverage green.
